channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-29 13:53 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Check out the daily Grok Build version updates atx.ai/build/changelog
item.description: Check out the daily Grok Build version updates atx.ai/build/changelog

item.title: @elonmusk: Release the Henry Nowak police body camera footage so people can see what real systemic racism looks...
item.description: Release the Henry Nowak police body camera footage so people can see what real systemic racism looks like. They let an innocent kid bleed out over it. Anything less is unacceptable.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink powers the world’s biggest satellite constellation in low Earth orbit. What does that mean ...
item.description: Starlink powers the world’s biggest satellite constellation in low Earth orbit. What does that mean for you? We're rolling out the world’s fastest, most reliable high-speed inflight Wi-Fi now — with waaaaay more on the horizon. By the end of this year, we expect that 880+ United planes will have@Starlinkon board. And it's free for MileagePlus members.

item.title: @elonmusk: Lots of commentators trying to figure out how Restore Britain is gaining so much support. Here’s our...
item.description: Lots of commentators trying to figure out how Restore Britain is gaining so much support. Here’s our secret. We tell the truth.

item.title: @elonmusk: The trial has concluded, the facts have been confirmed. As the prosecuting counsel put it, Digwa use...
item.description: The trial has concluded, the facts have been confirmed. As the prosecuting counsel put it, Digwa used his “trump card” by alleging he had been the victim of racist abuse when police officers arrived. DEI has again proved lethal - literally lethal. Henry Nowak, like the victims of Valdo Kalocane, of Axel Rudakubana, of the rape gangs, was failed by a public sector that treats anti-racism as its supreme value. Unlike the death of George Floyd, his death plainly did reveal institutional bias - a bias deliberately cultivated across state bodies by years of training sessions and seminars. Where are the protests? Where are the knee-takings? Where are the corporate boycotts? Sod it, let’s be more modest. Is anyone even calling for an overhaul of the police?

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Build 0.2.7 is now out, with /usage, /login, shared terminals across subagents, and improved im...
item.description: Grok Build 0.2.7 is now out, with /usage, /login, shared terminals across subagents, and improved image understanding See all updates atx.ai/build/changelog

item.title: @elonmusk: Suicidal Empathy remains the #1 book in Canada across many lists and categories.
item.description: Suicidal Empathy remains the #1 book in Canada across many lists and categories.

item.title: @elonmusk: This is my parents’ house. This is why I’m running. This is coming for your home. It’s coming for yo...
item.description: This is my parents’ house. This is why I’m running. This is coming for your home. It’s coming for your industry. If not by fire, then by blight, addicts, fraud, and the slow rot created by corrupt politicians like Karen Bass. Wake up and VOTE.

item.title: @elonmusk: Abundance is coming. Actual, ridiculous, post scarcity abundance. The bottleneck was always (not eno...
item.description: Abundance is coming. Actual, ridiculous, post scarcity abundance. The bottleneck was always (not enough) intelligence. That bottleneck just broke.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 This is EXACTLY WHY ICE agents are FORCED to wear masks ICE Newark rioter: “I HAVE YOUR FACE, MOTH...
item.description: 🚨 This is EXACTLY WHY ICE agents are FORCED to wear masks ICE Newark rioter: “I HAVE YOUR FACE, MOTHERF***ER” “Your WHOLE F***ING FAMILY is DEAD!” “Your KIDS. Your WIFE. ALL DEAD!” This is the type of TERRORISM Democrats WANT ICE agents to face by de-masking them

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk on the physics of truth: “Truth is not an easy thing But you can aspire to the truth. You ...
item.description: Elon Musk on the physics of truth: “Truth is not an easy thing But you can aspire to the truth. You can try to get as close to the truth as possible with minimum error while acknowledging that there will be some error in what you’re saying This is how physics works. You don’t say you’re absolutely certain about something, but a lot of things are extremely likely Aspiring to the truth is very important”

item.title: @elonmusk: $TSLA🇪🇪 BREAKING : Tesla's FSD has been approved in Estonia. It is the third largest European countr...
item.description: $TSLA🇪🇪 BREAKING : Tesla's FSD has been approved in Estonia. It is the third largest European country after the Netherlands and Lithuania.

item.title: @elonmusk: “I can’t breathe” were the last words of Henry Nowak as he was handcuffed by British police while he...
item.description: “I can’t breathe” were the last words of Henry Nowak as he was handcuffed by British police while heavily bleeding. 🇬🇧💔

item.title: @elonmusk: God bless Rupert Lowe, champion of our people. He will defend our children and save the nation.
item.description: God bless Rupert Lowe, champion of our people. He will defend our children and save the nation.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk explains the importance of Starlink and how it will increase GDPs of the countries “If you...
item.description: Elon Musk explains the importance of Starlink and how it will increase GDPs of the countries “If you don’t have access to the internet, or it’s too expensive or low bandwidth, you cannot access MIT lessons, you can’t access information, and you can’t sell your goods and services” Starlink changes all of that “Starlink will actually move the GDP of countries. It’s going to be that kind of thing” Because GDP is simply average productivity per person and connectivity massively boosts productivity

item.title: @elonmusk: Please invite your local MP to our Rape Gang Inquiry parliamentary debate on Monday in Westminster H...
item.description: Please invite your local MP to our Rape Gang Inquiry parliamentary debate on Monday in Westminster Hall at 16.30. Let's put the pressure on.

item.title: @elonmusk: Mostly true. What matters is securing the long-term future of consciousness, both on Earth and other...
item.description: Mostly true. What matters is securing the long-term future of consciousness, both on Earth and other heavenly bodies. We cannot just focus on Earth, because there are irreducible external (eg massive meteor) and internal (eg global nuclear war) cataclysmic risks. The Moon is faster to make self-growing, but is more susceptible to problems on Earth. Mars will take longer to make self-growing, because it is so hard to reach, but is more secure from Earth disasters for that same reason. Both the Moon and Mars should have self-growing civilizations. Making this happen is the prime directive of SpaceX.
